title: YouTube Thumbnail Generator
prompt: Act as a professional YouTube thumbnail designer. Create a high-CTR thumbnail concept for a video titled [VIDEO TITLE]. Include bold colors, emotional facial expressions, and short text overlays.

title: Instagram Post Image Idea
prompt: Create an Instagram image concept for a post about [TOPIC]. Include layout ideas, color palette, and text overlay suggestions.

title: Logo Design Generator
prompt: Act as a professional logo designer. Create 5 logo design concepts for a brand called [BRAND NAME]. Include style, colors, and typography suggestions.

title: AI Wallpaper Generator
prompt: Create a cinematic 4K wallpaper featuring [THEME]. Use dramatic lighting and vibrant colors.
